stemHtml: What is the definition of “Regulated Landing Mass”? It is the…

options.a: Lower of the Performance-Limited Landing Mass and the Maximum Structural Landing Mass, plus trip fuel.
options.b: Higher of the Performance-Limited Landing Mass and the Maximum Structural Landing Mass.
options.c: Lower of the Performance-Limited Landing Mass and the Maximum Structural Landing Mass.
options.d: Regulated Take-Off Mass minus the actual fuel consumed during the flight.
